channel.title: Stremio News
channel.description: Latest news and updates from the Stremio Blog

item.title: Stremio Tech Update #81 – Stremio v5 Released for Linux
item.description: We know Linux users have been asking for a new Stremio release for some time. While Stremio v5 has been in the Beta channel of Flatpak for a long time, there have been many issues with it that required a lot of our time and attention to get sorted. Today we became confident enough to…

item.title: Stremio Tech Update #80 – Stremio v5 & Stremio Web Updated
item.description: We just released an update for Stremio v5 (Windows and MacOS) and Stremio Web, let’s see what changed! Stremio Web (also UI for Stremio v5): Windows: MacOS: Stay tuned as we have more surprises for our users in 2026!

item.title: Stremio Released on Apple AltStore for Brazil
item.description: We recently announced that we released Stremio for AltStore for Europe and Japan, today we are happy to announce that we are also available with Stremio (full version) on AltStore for Brazil! As this is the full version of Stremio it includes torrent and usenet support. To install Stremio in these regions you would need…

item.title: Stremio Supporters – a way to sustain our development
item.description: Stremio has been completely free for the last 11 years – and it will always remain free! However, in order to deliver the quality, support and cutting-edge features you’re all used to, we’re launching Stremio Supporters: an optional way for our community to support the long-term development of our product. Stremio will always be free, and…

item.title: Stremio OpenSubtitles Hotfix
item.description: Due to a recent OpenSubtitles API change subtitles were no longer found for movies specifically. We just released a hotfix that should solution this and movies should start receiving subtitles again. We apologise for any inconvenience that this may have caused, have a great day!

item.title: Stremio Tech Update #79 – Stremio Android TV & Android Mobile Updated
item.description: After many months of testing, we released the Beta versions of Android TV (v1.10.2) and Android Mobile (v2.2.3) to Stable channel, many things changed, here are some highlights! Android TV:– Add MPV player– Add Usenet support– Add progressive seeking on player (the longer you seek the more the step increases)– Add seek duration settings– Add…

item.title: Stremio Tech Update #78 – Stremio v5 & Stremio Web Updated
item.description: We just released a Stremio v5 (MacOS) and Stremio Web update, here’s what changed: UI: Details: Improved the background image position Details: Correctly respect PWA safe area Add Gamepad / Controller Support (Xbox, Playstation, etc) MacOS app specific: Fixed HDR streams on external display being dimmed Stay tuned as we have more surprises for our…

item.title: Stremio Tech Update #77 – Stremio v5 & Stremio Web Updated
item.description: We just released a new version of Stremio v5 and Stremio Web (v5.0.0-beta.35), here’s what changed: Player: Added media key support (play/pause, next/previous track) Added video scale/zoom property Added HDR badge indicator Added context menu on subtitle choice (download subtitle, copy sub id, copy sub link) Show subtitle name when hovering in subtitle menu Fixed…

item.title: Stremio Tech Update #76 – Fixed Stremio v4 for High Sierra and Mojave
item.description: We (finally) managed to fix the Stremio v4 build (marked as “High Sierra and up” on the downloads page), to once again work on High Sierra and Mojave MacOS versions. This was a bigger challenge than we expected as we had to rebuild an old version of our app, while the libraries that were initially…

item.title: Stremio Tech Update #75 – Stremio Android TV Updated
item.description: We updated the android tv app (v1.9.12), here’s what changed: Fixed crash caused by huge images Fixed UI performance issues in player Fixed an issue that was causing audio/video desync Fixed a crash that would happen when an addon provides a malformed URL The update has already been approved on Google Play, for those that…
